content.speakerText: Sorry I haven't sent the report—my laptop crashed last night.
content.speakerTextCn: 抱歉没发报告，我昨晚电脑崩了。
expectedAnswers: No worries—just send it when you're ready.
Oh no! Is everything okay? Let me know if you need help recovering files.
Understood. Could you please send it by end of day?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了理解与支持，而非责备
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当（如 'crashed', 'send it', 'end of day'）
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常回应方式
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'send', 'delay', 'crashed'

content.speakerText: I apologize for the delay—the client changed the requirements again.
content.speakerTextCn: 很抱歉延迟了，客户又改了需求。
expectedAnswers: That's understandable. Please keep me posted once it's ready.
Again? I can help you reorganize the structure if you're overwhelmed.
Please prioritize this and CC me when you send it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否体现支持性回应与明确跟进要求
语言准确性：使用了正确句型如 'keep me posted', 'CC me', 'reorganize'
表达自然度：语气专业且协作性强，无生硬或命令式表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'delay', 'changed requirements', 'send', 'CC'

content.speakerText: I'm really sorry for the late email—I had a family emergency and couldn't access my computer.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常抱歉邮件延迟了，我遇到家庭紧急情况，无法访问电脑。
expectedAnswers: I'm so sorry to hear that. Please take care of your family first—we can wait.
That's completely understandable. Let me know if you need any support with catching up.
Thank you for letting me know. No rush—just update me when you're back online.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达共情并给予空间，而非施压
语言准确性：使用了恰当的安慰性表达（'I'm sorry to hear that', 'take care', 'no rush'）
表达自然度：语气温暖、专业，符合职场人文关怀语境
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'emergency', 'couldn't access', 'late', 'update'
